svg.text: ForeBlocks-DARTS: differentiable architecture search for multivariate time series forecasting

jointly searchable normalisation, hierarchical mixed operations (16 ops x 4 families), topology mode (enc-dec / enc-only / dec-only), and block-internal slots (see Transformer-block figure) - bi-level optimisation with five regularisers

g.text: X in R^(B x L x C)
DARTS cell DAG - mixed operation per edge
o_hat_e = sum_k p_e,k o_k(x) - soft / DrNAS Dir / GDAS straight-through

svg.text: |O| = 16 cell operations - hierarchical group x op factorisation p_e,k = pi_g(alpha_G) * q_g,k

g.text: retained iff p_e > theta - else -> Identity
- cell count K - hidden width d_h
early-stopping of poor candidates dominates GPU time
MAE / MSE / sMAPE reported per dataset
argmax norm / mode / bridge / pos applied as hard choice
